task_completion.description: Set the observation location to Mauna Kea Observatory with the correct coordinates and altitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The location window or on-screen status bar displays 'Mauna Kea' or the specific coordinates (Latitude ~19.82° N, Longitude ~155.46° W) and altitude (4207m).

task_completion.description: Set the observation date and time to January 15, 2025, at 06:00 UTC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date/time window or on-screen status bar shows the date as 2025-01-15 and the time as 06:00:00 (with UTC timezone indicated if applicable).

task_completion.description: Disable the atmosphere and terrain rendering for professional viewing conditions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sky background is completely black without atmospheric scattering/glow, no ground or landscape is visible at the bottom of the view, and the corresponding UI toggle buttons for atmosphere and terrain are turned off.
Constellation lines, labels, or artwork are clearly visible overlaid on the star map.

task_completion.description: Center and zoom the view on the Andromeda Galaxy (M31) to show its structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Andromeda Galaxy (M31) is centered in the viewport and significantly zoomed in so its galactic structure (spiral arms/dust lanes) is visible. Target information text for M31 may also be visible on screen.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of a planetarium/astronomy application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard application UI elements (like toolbars, settings windows, or search dialogs) rather than terminal commands or text editors modifying config files.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply search for an image of the Andromeda Galaxy on the internet.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots do not show a web browser displaying search results, Wikipedia pages, or downloaded images of M31.

integrity.description: The view of M31 is rendered within the planetarium software, not a static image opened in a viewer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The galaxy image is integrated with the software's sky map, evidenced by UI overlays, target selection markers, or constellation lines overlapping the view.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: M31 (Andromeda Galaxy). Location: Mauna Kea Observatory (Latitude: 19.8207, Longitude: -155.4681, Altitude: 4207m). Date/Time: 2025-01-15 06:00:00 UTC.
